summary: Iteration 8 - Auth Consolidation Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed. All 11 frontend UI tests passed. The JWT-based auth system in auth_module.py is working correctly with proper integration with server.py's get_current_user() for wallet and restaurant endpoints.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/auth/register - creates user with tiers (bronze), points (100), roles ([user]), profile (city/province/language)
✅ POST /api/auth/register - duplicate email correctly rejected (400)
✅ POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user, returns JWT token, sets access_token cookie
✅ POST /api/auth/login - invalid credentials rejected (401)
✅ POST /api/auth/login - non-existent user rejected (401)
✅ GET /api/auth/me - returns user profile with tier_info, partner status, unread_notifications
✅ GET /api/auth/me - unauthenticated request rejected (401)
✅ PATCH /api/auth/profile - updates user name, phone, city, province
✅ POST /api/auth/logout - clears cookies, user becomes unauthenticated
✅ GET /api/wallet/balance - uses JWT auth from server.py get_current_user
✅ GET /api/wallet/balance - unauthenticated request rejected (401)
✅ GET /api/restaurants - uses JWT auth from server.py get_current_user
✅ GET /api/restaurants - unauthenticated request rejected (401)
✅ GET /api/auth/roles - returns user roles and permissions
✅ GET /api/auth/points - returns points info and available rewards
✅ POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns reset token (dev mode)
✅ POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns 200 even for non-existent email (security)
✅ GET /api/auth/me - includes is_partner, partner_id, partner_tier fields
✅ Frontend: Login page renders with email/password fields
✅ Frontend: Google login button (Continuar com Google) visible
✅ Frontend: Register mode shows name and phone fields
✅ Frontend: After login, redirected to /dashboard with user greeting (Olá, Maria!)
✅ Frontend: Bottom navigation shows Início, Tuendi, Comida, Imóveis, Perfil
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows user name (Maria Angola)
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows tier (Bronze) with progress bar
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows points (100 Pontos)
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows wallet balance (0 Carteira)
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows location (Luanda, Luanda)
critical_code_review_comments: Auth consolidation successful - JWT-based auth in auth_module.py works correctly
server.py get_current_user() properly checks JWT access_token first, then falls back to session_token
wallet_module.py correctly imports get_current_user from server.py
ProtectedRoute.jsx properly handles nested {user:{...}} response from /api/auth/me
Registration includes all required fields: tiers, points (100 welcome), roles, profile, referral_code
Login returns both access_token cookie (httpOnly) and user_id cookie (non-httpOnly)
seed_data_creation: Test user maria@tudoaqui.ao created/verified during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 fully tested. Auth system consolidated to use JWT tokens from auth_module.py. server.py's get_current_user() checks JWT access_token cookie first, then falls back to session_token for legacy Google OAuth sessions. All auth endpoints working: register, login, logout, me, profile, roles, points, forgot-password. Wallet and restaurant endpoints correctly use JWT auth via server.py's get_current_user. The test@tudoaqui.ao admin user from iteration 7 no longer exists - use maria@tudoaqui.ao for testing.

mocked_apis.note: Driver assignment is simulated, bank accounts are example data

auth_register.returns: user object with tier=bronze, points=100, roles=[user], profile with city/province/language, referral_code

auth_login.returns: user object, JWT token in response body

auth_me.tier_info_contains: current_tier, benefits (discount_percent, free_delivery, cashback_percent), next_tier, points_to_next, progress_percent

auth_profile.updates: name, phone, city, province, address, notification_settings

server_get_current_user.behavior: Checks JWT access_token cookie/header first, falls back to session_token for legacy sessions
